title: Proxy uses plain HTTP to in-cluster opencode (G4)
expected: Defence-in-depth: proxy SHOULD use HTTPS or run behind a service mesh
observed: Static: proxy.go:405 fmt.Sprintf("http://%s:%d%s", podIP, opencodePort, targetPath)
notes: Mitigated by NetworkPolicy (only API can reach workspace pod port 4096) and by Basic Auth password between API and opencode. Residual risk: cluster-network attacker who breaks NetPol can sniff traffic. Recommend service mesh (Linkerd/Istio mTLS) when cluster size grows.
